creator: sbrabec@suse.cz
text:
Please note that OpenBSD reverted this patch, as this causes problems sending CR to
some Cisco equipment:
https://github.com/openbsd/src/commit/236ebfd2653ae1e518b76677141a1e7028b688c0

Original commit in OpenBSD:
https://github.com/openbsd/src/commit/961b2b404f0df4cec33e661ca2a9ffa1cddfec65

I cannot say whether my patch is incorrect or the Cisco equipment behavior is incorrect.

But anyway, it fixes behavior in some cases and breaks in other cases.
